text: Moving from a quiet, sterile corridor into this stimulating exhibition space stirs within me a sense of transition—from the ordinary to the curious. Words on the screen echo my own sensations: my perception is challenged, the colors and lights invite contemplation. Here, surrounded by the artifacts of research and development, I feel both small and invigorated, reminded of how swiftly clarity can shift to confusion, and how knowledge and innovation emerge from this very interplay. I feel alive and mindful—a participant in the ongoing dance of understanding and discovery.
